barRaise.topFinding: The uncommitted-arc crisis that put HBH at-risk yesterday is resolved: the v0.81-v0.84 3D arc and the gameplay work after it were committed and released to v0.93.0, version markers are back in sync, and the tree is clean. All four prior HIGH findings cleared. What remains is strategic: the project is driving two render directions at once. The 2D gameplay code keeps advancing (cursor v0.92, Dispatches v0.93, Light HP v0.91) while the only menu-launchable scenes are the three 3D demos, with Campaign and Test Arena paused. Two latent 2D correctness bugs (fog vision dispatch against the renamed building roster, and the missing save_version) sit in that paused-but-actively-edited path. The highest-leverage move is to decide the render lane.
